summary: Completed testing of new order features: Delete with reason, Reference image upload, Front/back neck reference images. All 8 backend tests passed. All UI elements verified working.
passed_tests: DELETE /api/orders/{id} requires reason field (422 without reason)
DELETE /api/orders/{id} with reason successfully deletes and archives order
POST /api/orders/{id}/images endpoint exists and uploads images
Image upload with image_type=front_neck_0 works correctly
Image upload with image_type=back_neck_0 works correctly
GET /api/orders/{id} returns images array with uploaded images
Orders list page shows delete (trash) button on each order card
Delete modal opens with reason textarea and confirm button
OrderForm page has 'Reference Images' section with 'Upload Image' button
Each item has 'Add front neck reference' upload button
Each item has 'Add back neck reference' upload button
Front Neck Design and Back Neck Design textareas exist per item
seed_data_creation: Created test order for delete testing (auto-deleted). Uploaded test images to KSH-636 (reference, front_neck_0, back_neck_0).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features verified: 1) Delete order with reason - modal opens with textarea, API archives to deleted_orders collection before removing. 2) Reference Images section on OrderForm with Upload Image button. 3) Per-item front/back neck reference upload buttons. Order KSH-636 has 3 test images uploaded. KSH-580 was deleted during testing.
